Ctrl-A moves to beginning, type prefix
Ctrl-K kills to end of line

Ctrl-E moves to end, Ctrl-B moves back one
Ctrl-W deletes word backward
Complex edit: clear + type + Ctrl-A + type prefix

steps.observed: → gamma, beta, alpha in display order

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. All rename mode behaviors confirmed working: dialog opens correctly (VAL-ACT-010), input validation rejects empty/slash/same-name/existing/whitespace-only (VAL-ACT-011), spaces normalize to dashes (VAL-ACT-012), script format matches specification (VAL-ACT-013), ESC cancels with exit 1 (VAL-ACT-014), full line editing support with Ctrl-A/E/B/F/K/W and Backspace (VAL-ACT-015), and navigation correctly targets the selected entry (VAL-CROSS-011).
